description:
Powerful text editing tool

Powerful text editing tool with syntax highlighting support for programming languages and scripts, multi-caret and synchronized editing, code/text folding, over 600 options for customizing, over 100 ready made skins, ChatGPT, spell checker, image/PDF view, Markdown/RTF/SVG preview, character map, numerical unit convert tool, text compare, JSON/SQL/XML formatter, support for multiple directories (also SFTP) and search results, etc.
- Added HTML and PDF export for Markdown preview
- Added Windows on Arm 64-bit Emulation Compatible (EC) support
- Fixed 3rd party libraries to support Windows on Arm
- Fixed about dialog
- Fixed and refactored AlphaControls to support Windows on Arm
- Fixed check for update
- Fixed clipboard issues
- Fixed directory
- Fixed download all skins
- Fixed download dialog
- Fixed file read only
- Fixed madExcept attachment settings
- Fixed reload changed files
- Fixed skin selector
- Fixed text editor control - https://codeberg.org/TextEditorPro/TTextEditor
- Optimized HtmlViewer - https://github.com/BerndGabriel/HtmlViewer
- Refactored AES encrypt/decrypt
- Updated Delphi 13.1 64-bit - https://www.embarcadero.com/products/rad-studio
- Updated Graphics32 library - https://github.com/graphics32/graphics32
- Updated language files
- Updated PDFium 148.0.7763.0 binaries (DLL files) - https://github.com/bblanchon/pdfium-binaries

Note! This product is always completely FREE for you. See the license.
